result: {"schema_version":1,"pass":false,"review_status":"completed","summary":"移除了 sanitize_output，process() 的回傳值未經淨化直接輸出，可能引發 XSS 或 injection","issues":[{"severity":"critical","confidence":"medium","category":"security","file":"app/handlers.py","line_hint":"L22","check":"sanitize_output(result) 被移除，process(data) 的回傳值直接 return","verdict":"若 process() 回傳內容包含使用者可控資料，移除輸出淨化會讓 XSS 或 response injection 成為可能","fix":"保留 sanitize_output 呼叫：return sanitize_output(process(data))；或確認 process() 內部已完整淨化所有輸出路徑"}]}
